nasb.text: ‘Should evil come upon us, the sword, or judgment, or pestilence, or famine, we will stand before this house and before You (for Your name is in this house) and cry to You in our distress, and You will hear and deliver us.’

esv.text: ‘If disaster comes upon us, the sword, judgment, or pestilence, or famine, we will stand before this house and before you—for your name is in this house—and cry out to you in our affliction, and you will hear and save.’

cnv.text: ‘如果有災禍臨到我們，無論是刀劍、刑罰、瘟疫、饑荒，我們在急難的時候，站在這殿和你的面前，向你呼求，你必垂聽和施行拯救，因為你的名是在這殿內。’

ccb.text: ‘如果我们遭遇祸患，无论是战祸、瘟疫或饥荒，当我们在急难中站在这殿前向你呼求时，你必定垂听，施行拯救，因为你的名在这殿里。’
